title: Free vs. Pro: What's included?
description: Understand the differences between WagerProof's free tier and Pro subscription.

content.text: WagerProof offers a free tier so you can explore the platform before committing to a subscription. Here's what's available in each tier.

items: Limited game predictions for each sport (a preview of what the models offer).
Access to the live scoreboard with real-time scores.
Basic betting trends and public money data.
Community features like feature requests and voting.
Full access to all model predictions across NFL, CFB, NBA, and NCAAB.
AI Agents -- create up to 5 personalized virtual picks experts.
WagerBot AI assistant for conversational betting analysis.
Advanced analytics tools (NFL Analytics Dashboard, Teaser Sharpness Tool, Bet Slip Grader).
Detailed game analysis with AI-generated insights.
Halftime trends and edge accuracy tracking.

content.text: Pro subscriptions are managed through RevenueCat. You can subscribe through the mobile app (iOS/Android) or on the web.
